# kSecCodeInfoFormat

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string representing the type and format of the code in a form suitable for display to a knowledgeable user.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoFormat: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] object.

This is generic information returned regardless of which [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/code-signing-information-flags]  you pass to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function.
title: kSecCodeInfoFormat
